case_title: JAMIE PADUA VS. GARY D. WHITE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PADUA, JAMIE AS TO DEFENDANT WHITE, GARY D. AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA ABSOLUTE GRANITE & RESTORATION CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PADUA, JAMIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITE, GARY D. AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA ABSOLUTE GRANITE & RESTORATION CO. $6,093.82 PRINCIPAL, $4.32 INTEREST, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,251.44, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PADUA, JAMIE AS TO DEFENDANT WHITE, GARY D. AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA ABSOLUTE GRANITE & RESTORATION CO.
